summary: The Phase 3 / 4 dataset decision plan was implemented as docs-only updates. The MVP default clip duration is fixed at 0.5 s; torque variation remains diagnostic/robustness only; Brownian is excluded for now; RUN-TUMBLE is deferred to v2+ with a shortened dataset-generation profile; light render variation is allowed as training augmentation; and n_flagella=4 stays diagnostic-only for v1/MVP with v2 reconsideration.
non_blocking_issues: The exact shortened RUN-TUMBLE v2 profile values remain intentionally undecided until Issue #69 implementation and validation.
The numeric range for light render augmentation remains dependent on Issue #8 and Issue #17 real-video/render-condition work.
adr_reason: Docs-only dataset planning decisions. No schema, implementation behavior, physical model, dependency, or output contract was changed.
next_actions: Implement Phase 3 window generation with 0.5 s non-overlap as the default and 0.25 s / 1.0 s comparison support.
Add an MVP dataset freeze check that rejects torque variation, RUN-TUMBLE, and Brownian from the v1 training baseline.
Define the shortened RUN-TUMBLE v2 profile after Issue #69 implementation work.
